name: Bei Yu
page_title: Bei Yu 貝羽 [Liu Biao] – Romance of the Three Kingdoms Encyclopedia – Kongming’s Archives
historical_notes: Bei Yu served as a county magistrate in Nan in AD 190. He set himself up as an independent warlord, but was later persuaded to surrender to Liu Biao.

sections.short-biography: A county magistrate in Nan. Independent in AD 190, later submitted to Liu Biao.

full_text:
Bei Yu 貝羽
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Bei Yu (貝羽). A county magistrate in Nan. Independent in AD 190, later submitted to Liu Biao. Bei Yu was affiliated with Liu Biao.

BiographyHistoric (Confirmed)
Bei Yu served as a county magistrate in Nan in AD 190. He set himself up as an independent warlord, but was later persuaded to surrender to Liu Biao.
